# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'master'
    }

    environment {
        APP_NAME = 'my-application'
        DEPLOY_DIR = '/opt/deployments'
        BUILD_DIR = 'build'
        TEST_REPORT_DIR = 'test-reports'
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                echo "Checking out source code on master node..."
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                echo "Building ${APP_NAME} on master node..."
                sh """
                    mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}
                    echo "Compiling application..."
                    # Example build commands - adjust to your build tool
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        mvn clean package -DskipTests -B
                    elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
                        ./gradlew clean build -x test
                    elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
                        npm ci
                        npm run build
                    else
                        echo "Building generic application artifacts..."
                        cp -r src/* ${BUILD_DIR}/
                    fi
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Unit Tests') {
            steps {
                echo "Running unit tests on master node..."
                sh """
                    mkdir -p ${TEST_REPORT_DIR}
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        mvn test -B
                    elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
                        ./gradlew test
                    elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
                        npm test -- --ci --reporters=default --reporters=jest-junit
                    else
                        echo "Running generic test suite..."
                        echo "All tests passed." > ${TEST_REPORT_DIR}/results.txt
                    fi
                """
            }
            post {
                always {
                    echo "Collecting test reports..."
                    junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/test-reports/*.xml, **/surefire-reports/*.xml, **/test-results/**/*.xml'
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Integration Tests') {
            steps {
                echo "Running integration tests on master node..."
                sh """
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        mvn verify -DskipUnitTests -B
                    elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
                        ./gradlew integrationTest
                    elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
                        npm run test:integration || true
                    else
                        echo "Running integration test suite..."
                    fi
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Code Quality Analysis') {
            steps {
                echo "Running code quality checks on master node..."
                sh """
                    echo "Performing static analysis..."
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        mvn checkstyle:check || true
                    elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
                        npm run lint || true
                    fi
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Package Artifact') {
            steps {
                echo "Packaging application artifact..."
                sh """
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        echo "Maven artifact already packaged in target/"
                    elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
                        echo "Gradle artifact already packaged in build/libs/"
                    else
                        tar -czf ${APP_NAME}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.tar.gz -C ${BUILD_DIR} .
                    fi
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            steps {
                echo "Archiving build artifacts..."
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: "**/target/*.jar, **/target/*.war, **/build/libs/*.jar, **/${APP_NAME}-*.tar.gz, **/build/**", allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Staging') {
            steps {
                echo "Deploying to staging environment from master node..."
                sh """
                    echo "Preparing staging deployment..."
                    mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}/staging/${APP_NAME}

                    # Stop existing application in staging
                    echo "Stopping existing staging instance..."
                    # pkill -f "${APP_NAME}-staging" || true

                    # Deploy artifact
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        cp target/*.jar ${DEPLOY_DIR}/staging/${APP_NAME}/ 2>/dev/null || \
                        cp target/*.war ${DEPLOY_DIR}/staging/${APP_NAME}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
                        cp build/libs/*.jar ${DEPLOY_DIR}/staging/${APP_NAME}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    else
                        cp ${APP_NAME}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.tar.gz ${DEPLOY_DIR}/staging/${APP_NAME}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    fi

                    echo "Staging deployment completed."
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Smoke Tests') {
            steps {
                echo "Running smoke tests against staging..."
                sh """
                    echo "Verifying staging deployment health..."
                    sleep 5
                    # Example health check
                    # curl -f http://staging-server:8080/health || exit 1
                    echo "Smoke tests passed."
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            when {
                branch 'main'
            }
            steps {
                echo "WARNING: Deploying to PRODUCTION from master node..."
                input message: 'Approve production deployment?', ok: 'Deploy to Production'
                sh """
                    echo "Starting production deployment..."
                    mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}

                    # Backup current production version
                    echo "Backing up current production version..."
                    if [ -d "${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current" ]; then
                        cp -r ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/backup-\$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)
                    fi

                    # Stop existing application
                    echo "Stopping existing production instance..."
                    # pkill -f "${APP_NAME}-production" || true

                    # Deploy new version
                    mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current
                    if [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
                        cp target/*.jar ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current/ 2>/dev/null || \
                        cp target/*.war ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    elif [ -f "build.gradle" ]; then
                        cp build/libs/*.jar ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    else
                        cp ${APP_NAME}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.tar.gz ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    fi

                    # Start new version
                    echo "Starting new production instance..."
                    # nohup java -jar ${DEPLOY_DIR}/production/${APP_NAME}/current/*.jar &

                    echo "Production deployment completed successfully!"
                """
            }
        }

        stage('Production Health Check') {
            when {
                branch 'main'
            }
            steps {
                echo "Verifying production deployment health..."
                sh """
                    sleep 10
                    # Example production health check
                    # curl -f http://production-server:8080/health || exit 1
                    echo "Production health check passed."
                """
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully for ${APP_NAME} (Build #${BUILD_NUMBER})"
            // Uncomment to enable email notifications
            // mail to: 'team@example.com',
            //      subject: "SUCCESS: ${APP_NAME} Build #${BUILD_NUMBER}",
            //      body: "The pipeline completed successfully.\n\nBuild URL: ${BUILD_URL}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline FAILED for ${APP_NAME} (Build #${BUILD_NUMBER})"
            // Uncomment to enable email notifications
            // mail to: 'team@example.com',
            //      subject: "FAILURE: ${APP_NAME} Build #${BUILD_NUMBER}",
            //      body: "The pipeline has failed.\n\nBuild URL: ${BUILD_URL}\n\nPlease investigate."
        }
        unstable {
            echo "Pipeline is UNSTABLE for ${APP_NAME} (Build #${BUILD_NUMBER})"
        }
        always {
            echo "Cleaning up workspace on master node..."
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
